data.headline: Find Your Place by the Sea
data.tagline: Your Outer Banks Dream Home Awaits
data.body: Maya Torres brings 15 years of coastal expertise and deep OBX market knowledge to every transaction. Whether you're searching for an oceanfront retreat or a sound-side investment, Maya delivers results.

data.title: Our Services
data.subtitle: Coastal real estate expertise for buyers and sellers.

items.title: Beach Home Search
items.description: We'll match you with the perfect oceanfront, soundside, or canal-front property that fits your lifestyle and budget.

items.title: Vacation Rental Advisory
items.description: Maximize your rental income with data-driven pricing strategies and property optimization for OBX vacation rentals.

items.title: Waterfront Valuation
items.description: Get an accurate market value for your waterfront property based on recent comparable coastal sales.

items.title: Relocation Support
items.description: Moving to the Outer Banks full-time? We'll help you navigate neighborhoods, flood zones, and HOA considerations.

items.title: Investment Properties
items.description: Identify high-yield beach investment opportunities with detailed rental income projections and ROI analysis.

data.title: How It Works
data.subtitle: Three simple steps to your dream beach home.

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your ideal coastal property — location, size, budget, and must-haves. We'll listen carefully.

steps.title: Explore Properties
steps.description: We'll curate a selection of the best matching properties and schedule private showings at your convenience.

steps.title: Close & Celebrate
steps.description: From offer to closing, we handle every detail so you can focus on planning your first beach weekend.

data.title: Recent Sales
data.subtitle: Coastal properties I've helped clients buy and sell.

items.text: Maya found us the perfect oceanfront cottage in Duck. She knew every street on the Outer Banks and made the whole process completely stress-free. We were under contract in two weeks!
We were buying our first vacation rental and had no idea where to start. Maya provided rental income projections, flood zone info, and HOA details for every property. Invaluable expertise.
Sold our Nags Head beach house at $50K over asking price in a single weekend. Maya's marketing strategy and local network are unmatched. Couldn't be happier.

data.title: What's Your Beach Home Worth?
data.subtitle: Free coastal market analysis.
data.description: Curious what your Outer Banks property is worth in today's market? Get a **free** personalized coastal CMA delivered to your inbox — no obligation.

data.title: About Maya
bio: Maya Torres is a licensed real estate broker with 15 years of Outer Banks experience and over 300 successful coastal transactions. Born and raised on the North Carolina coast, she brings insider knowledge of every OBX community — from Corolla to Hatteras.

Maya specializes in oceanfront, soundfront, and canal-front properties, as well as vacation rental investment strategies. She is fluent in English and Spanish and serves clients relocating from across the country.
When she's not helping clients find their perfect piece of the coast, you'll find Maya kayaking on the sound or volunteering with the OBX Sea Turtle Project.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.subheading: Your Coastal Market Analysis Is On Its Way!
thank_you.body: {firstName} will send your personalized beach home valuation to your email shortly.
thank_you.disclaimer: This report is a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) and is not an appraisal. Coastal market conditions may vary.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.body: Maya Torres and Coastal Realty Group respect your privacy. Information collected through this site is used solely to provide you with real estate services and coastal market analysis. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties. For questions, contact maya@testrealty.com.

terms_of_service.title: Terms of Service
terms_of_service.body: By using this website, you agree to receive real estate communications from Maya Torres at Coastal Realty Group. Market analysis reports are for informational purposes only and do not constitute a formal appraisal. All information is believed to be accurate but is not guaranteed.

fair_housing.title: Fair Housing Statement
fair_housing.body: Maya Torres and Coastal Realty Group are committed to the Fair Housing Act. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, national origin, sex, disability, or familial status. Every client deserves equal access to coastal real estate opportunities.
